params.name: items
params.description: Array of breadcrumb item objects shown in the full desktop trail.

params.name: text
params.description: Text to use within the breadcrumb item.

params.name: href
params.description: Link for the breadcrumb item. If omitted, the item is rendered as text only.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the individual crumb.

params.name: text
params.description: Text for the final breadcrumb item and the tablet/mobile back link label.

params.name: href
params.description: Link for the final breadcrumb item and the tablet/mobile back link target.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the breadcrumb container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the container.
